signals.message: Deliver the seeneyu Design System for M1. This unblocks all implementation work (M2, M3, M4). You need to produce: (1) design-system.md with color tokens, typography scale, spacing scale, dark UI conventions; (2) component spec: Clip Card (library grid item — thumbnail, skill badge, difficulty badge, title, duration); (3) component spec: Coaching Screen (two-panel layout — left: YouTube video + annotation overlay, right: webcam record panel + controls); (4) component spec: Feedback Card (score breakdown by dimension, AI tip text, retry CTA). All output files go in .shared/outputs/design/. The phase gate for M1 is: design-system.md exists + 3 component specs delivered.
signals.context: Read .shared/memory/shared-knowledge.md for full product context, skills taxonomy, and difficulty scoring. Tech stack: Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, dark UI (gray-900/950 base). The app is dark-themed — all specs must reflect this.
